---
title: ""
output: 
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
---
<style>
.html-widget {
    width: 910px !important;
    height: 975px !important;
}
body { margin: 0; }
</style>

```{r, include=FALSE}
# load libraries and test data
source("W:\\RDA Team\\R\\credentials_source.R")
source(here("MOSAIC", "charts", "chart_style_vars.R"))
con <- connect_to_db("mosaic")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

```

```{r}
##### DOCUMENTATION (can skip to next section for indicator inputs) #####
### Requirements: drilldown_js
# total_rate - single variable to establish vertical plotline; total/state rate  of the indicator  

### Requirements: drillup_js
# none

### Requirements: Chart Metadata
# data_source - e.g., "US Department of Health and Human Services, Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), National Center for Health Statistics, Division of Vital Statistics, CDC WONDER Online Database (2016-2023)"

# data_description - e.g., "The number of infants born weighing less than 2,500 grams or about 5 lbs 8 oz per 100 live births by race/ethnicity of birthing parent. Estimates for racial groups with fewer than ten births or areas with fewer than 100,000 people were excluded to protect privacy. SWANA data includes only foreign-born birthing parents."

# methodology_link - e.g., "<a href='https://catalystcalifornia.github.io/RaceCounts/Methodology/Indicator_Methodology_CountyState.html' target='_blank'>Full Methodology</a>"

# chart_title - e.g., "Low Birthweight by Race/Ethnicity"

# chart_subtitle - e.g., "Click the Asian or Total bar below to disaggregate data"

# indicator_asbest - e.g., "min" or "max"

### Requirements: Chart data / Dataframe structure
# The ideal shape of the indicator table is long - with columns for group, subgroup, rate, count. It should have both the mosaic group (asian and/or nhpi and total which should include state (subgroup = total) and the RC race subgroups). It should also have Asian/NHPI as a subgroup under total group
# Ideally rates are already rounded in this table or the metadata table includes this (or we make all round to 1 decimal place)
# Ideally it or an accompanying metadata table includes the asbest value for the indicator.
# additional metadata fields include round rate unless we want all indicators to round to one place
# group - name of column with aggregate group name (e.g., Asian, NHPI, Total) - should be all caps
# subgroup - name of column with subgroup names (Chinese, Indian, etc.) - should be all caps
# rate - name of column with indicator raced rates
# count - name of column with indicator raced counts
```

```{r}
##### Prep: Get data (must change for each indicator) #####
# Get indicator df
indicator_df <- dbGetQuery(con, "")


# Set total_rate
total_rate <- indicator_df %>% filter(group=="total" & subgroup == "total") %>% select(rate) %>% pull()

# Set metadata - see documentation above for examples
indicator_asbest <- ""
data_source <- ""
data_description <- ""
mosaic_methodology_link <- ""
methodology_link <- sprintf("<a href='%s' target='_blank'>Full Methodology</a>", mosaic_methodology_link)
chart_title <- ""
chart_subtitle <- ""
```


```{r}
##### Prep: Edit data for chart (don't change) #####

# use indicator best direction to arrange "shared struggle" groups at top
if(indicator_asbest=="min") {
  indicator_df <- indicator_df %>%
    arrange(desc(rate))
  
} else{
  indicator_df <- indicator_df %>%
    arrange(rate)
}

# make groups all caps per RC style
indicator_df$group <- toupper(indicator_df$group)
indicator_df$subgroup <- toupper(indicator_df$subgroup)

# define df initial chart of drilldown (asian and total bars only)
base_df <- indicator_df %>%
  filter(subgroup=="TOTAL") %>%
  select(-subgroup) %>%
  mutate(
    color = case_when(
      group == "ASIAN" ~ base_colors[["asian"]],
      group == "NHPI" ~ base_colors[["nhpi"]],
      group == "TOTAL" ~ base_colors[["total"]],
      TRUE ~ base_colors[["default"]]))

```


```{r}
##### Chart behavior: define JS to control behavior of drilldown (don't change) #####
### Drilldown js ----------------------
drilldown_js <- paste0("function(e) {
  var chart = this;
  
  // Check if seriesOptions exists first
  if (!e.seriesOptions) {
    return;
  }
  
  // Store the original drilldown data before any modifications
  var seriesId = e.seriesOptions.id;
  
  if (!chart.originalDrilldownData) {
    chart.originalDrilldownData = {};
  }
  
  // Store both rate and count sorted data from the drilldown series options
  if (e.seriesOptions.data && e.seriesOptions.data_count_sorted) {
    chart.originalDrilldownData[seriesId] = {
      rateSorted: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(e.seriesOptions.data)),
      countSorted: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(e.seriesOptions.data_count_sorted))
    };
  }
  
  // Add plot line (only for rates view)
  chart.yAxis[0].addPlotLine({
    id: 'total-line',
    value: ", total_rate, ",
    color: '", rc_black, "' ,
    width: 2,
    dashStyle: 'ShortDash',
    zIndex: 5,
    label: {style: {fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: '0.8em'}, text: 'STATE AVERAGE: ", total_rate, "', align: 'left', rotation: 0, y: 5, x: 5 }
  });
  
  // Reset state - always start with rates
  chart.currentView = 'rates';
  
  // Update data label formatter for rates (initial state)
  chart.update({
    plotOptions: {
      bar: {
        states: {
          hover: {
            enabled: false  // Disable hover in drilldown
          }
        },
        dataLabels: {
          formatter: function() {
            return this.y;
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }, false);

  chart.yAxis[0].setTitle({ text: 'RATE' }, false); 

  
  // Add toggle button if it doesn't exist
  if (!chart.customToggleButton) {
    chart.customToggleButton = chart.renderer.button(
      'Show Counts',
      chart.chartWidth - 106,           // Match drillup horizontal position
      chart.chartHeight / 2 - 50,       // Above the middle where drillup sits
      function() {
        if (chart.currentView === 'rates') {
          // Switch to counts
          chart.currentView = 'counts';
          // Use this instead of .update()
          chart.yAxis[0].setTitle({ text: 'COUNT' }, false); 

          chart.customToggleButton.attr({text: 'Show Rates'});
          
          // Remove the state average line
          chart.yAxis[0].removePlotLine('total-line');
          
          // Update all drilled-down series to show counts
          chart.series.forEach(function(s) {
            if (s.options.id && chart.originalDrilldownData[s.options.id]) {
              s.setData(chart.originalDrilldownData[s.options.id].countSorted, false);
            }
          });
          
          // Update data label formatter for counts
          chart.update({
            plotOptions: { 
              bar: {
                dataLabels: {
                  formatter: function() {
                    return this.y.toLocaleString('en-US');
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          }, false);
          
        } else {
          // Switch to rates
          chart.currentView = 'rates';
          chart.yAxis[0].setTitle({ text: 'RATE' }, false); 

          chart.customToggleButton.attr({text: 'Show Counts'});
          
          // Re-add the state average line
          chart.yAxis[0].addPlotLine({
            id: 'total-line',
            value: ", total_rate, ",
            color: '", rc_black, "' ,
            width: 2,
            dashStyle: 'ShortDash',
            zIndex: 5,
            label: {style: {fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: '0.8em'}, text: 'STATE AVERAGE: ", total_rate, "', align: 'left', rotation: 0, y: 5, x: 5 }
          });
          
          // Update all drilled-down series to show rates
          chart.series.forEach(function(s) {
            if (s.options.id && chart.originalDrilldownData[s.options.id]) {
              s.setData(chart.originalDrilldownData[s.options.id].rateSorted, false);
            }
          });
          
          // Update data label formatter for rates
          chart.update({
            plotOptions: {
              bar: {
                dataLabels: {
                  formatter: function() {
                    return this.y;
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          }, false);
        }
        
        chart.redraw();
      },
      {
        fill: '", rc_blue, "' ,
        stroke: '", rc_blue, "' ,
        style: { color: '", rc_white, "' },
        'stroke-width': 1,
        r: 3,
        padding: 8
      },
      {
        fill: '", rc_blue, "' ,
        style: { color: '", rc_white, "' }  // Add this so font color stays white in hover state
      },
      {
        fill: '", rc_blue, "' ,
        style: { color: '", rc_white, "' }  // Add this so font color stays white for active/pressed state
      }
    )
    .css({
      color: '", rc_white, "'
    })
    .attr({ zIndex: 7 })  // Add this line to put on top of gridlines
    .add();
    
    // Add event listener to reposition on redraw/resize
    Highcharts.addEvent(chart, 'redraw', function() {
      if (chart.customToggleButton) {
        var buttonWidth = chart.customToggleButton.getBBox().width;
        var rightEdge = chart.chartWidth - chart.spacing[1];
        chart.customToggleButton.attr({
          x: rightEdge - buttonWidth
        });
      }
    });
    
    // Initial positioning
    var buttonWidth = chart.customToggleButton.getBBox().width;
    var rightEdge = chart.chartWidth - chart.spacing[1];
    chart.customToggleButton.attr({
      x: rightEdge - buttonWidth
    });
  } else {
    // Button exists, reset it
    chart.customToggleButton.attr({text: 'Show Counts'});
  }
  
  chart.redraw();
}")

### Drillup js ----------------------
drillup_js <- paste0("function() { 
  var chart = this;
  chart.yAxis[0].removePlotLine('total-line');
  
  // CRITICAL: Reset all drilldown series data back to rate-sorted BEFORE drilling up
  // This ensures the next drilldown starts with the correct data
  if (chart.originalDrilldownData && chart.options.drilldown && chart.options.drilldown.series) {
    chart.options.drilldown.series.forEach(function(drilldownSeries) {
      var seriesId = drilldownSeries.id;
      if (chart.originalDrilldownData[seriesId]) {
        drilldownSeries.data = chart.originalDrilldownData[seriesId].rateSorted;
      }
    });
  }
  
  // Remove toggle button on drillup
  if (chart.customToggleButton) {
    chart.customToggleButton.destroy();
    chart.customToggleButton = null;
  }
  
  // Clear state
  chart.currentView = null;
  
  // Reset to rates view
  // Use this instead of .update()
  chart.yAxis[0].setTitle({ text: 'RATE' }, false); 

  
  // Reset data label formatter
  chart.update({
    plotOptions: {
      bar: {
        dataLabels: {
          formatter: function() {
            return this.y;
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }, false);
  
  chart.redraw();
}")
```


```{r}
##### Chart: Highcharts drilldown (don't change) #####
hc <- hchart(
  base_df,
  "bar",
  hcaes(x = group, y = rate, drilldown = group, y2 = count, color=color),
  name = "Overview",
  colorByPoint = FALSE) %>%
  hc_chart(
    height = 400, 
    scrollablePlotArea = list(minHeight = 500, opacity = 0.9),
    events = list(
      drilldown = JS(drilldown_js),
      drillup = JS(drillup_js))) %>%
  hc_tooltip(enabled = FALSE) %>%
  hc_drilldown(
    allowPointDrilldown = TRUE,
  series = list_parse(drilldown_df),
  activeDataLabelStyle = list(
    color = rc_black,
    textDecoration = "none",
    fontWeight = "normal"
  ),
  activeAxisLabelStyle = list(
    color = rc_black,
    textDecoration = "none",
    cursor = "pointer"
  ),
  drillUpButton = list(
    relativeTo = "spacingBox",
    position = list(
      align = "right",
      verticalAlign = "middle"
    )
  )) %>%
  hc_title(
    text = chart_title,
    align = "center" ) %>% 
  hc_subtitle(
    text = chart_subtitle,
    align = "center") %>%
  hc_plotOptions(
    bar = list(
      dataLabels = list(
        enabled = TRUE,
        align = "right",
        inside = FALSE))) %>% 
  hc_xAxis(
    title=list(text=NULL),
    labels = list(
      enabled = TRUE)) %>%
  hc_yAxis(title = list(text = "RATE"),
           labels=list(enabled=FALSE)) %>%# remove labels from rate axis) 
  hc_legend(enabled=FALSE) %>%
  hc_caption(
    text = paste("<b>About the data:", data_source, "</b>", data_description, methodology_link),
    useHTML = TRUE,
    align = "left"
  ) %>%
  hc_add_theme(custom_theme)


# Wrap with constrained width
htmltools::tagList(
  htmltools::tags$div(
    class = "chart-wrapper",
    style = "max-width: 1200px; width: 100%; margin: 0 auto;",
    htmltools::tags$div(
      class = "chart-container",
      style = "height: auto; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #ccc;",
      hc
    )
  ),
  htmltools::tags$script(HTML("
    function resizeChart() {
      if (typeof Highcharts !== 'undefined' && Highcharts.charts.length > 0) {
        Highcharts.charts.forEach(function(chart) {
          if (chart) {
            var wrapper = document.querySelector('.chart-wrapper');
            if (wrapper) {
              var targetWidth = wrapper.offsetWidth - 40;
              chart.setSize(targetWidth, null, false);
            }
          }
        });
      }
    }
    
    setTimeout(resizeChart, 100);
    window.addEventListener('resize', resizeChart);
  "))
)

```
